_comment: EVAL-04 (lite) seed retrieval cases. `expected_claim_ids` are the claims a correct retriever must surface for the job. `confidence` is recorded so the rank-before-cap regression test can reproduce the old confidence-first behaviour. Banks are kept small so precision@k is meaningful.

job.title: Director Agentic AI
job.description: Agentic AI for drug development using LangGraph and AutoGen in healthcare.

evidence_bank.claim_text: Built LangGraph multi-agent platforms for enterprise AI.
Delivered AutoGen agent workflows in a healthcare setting.
Managed quarterly finance reporting for the FP&A team.
Ran the office relocation logistics project.

job.title: Principal Payments Engineer
job.description: Scale payments infrastructure for reliability and low latency.

evidence_bank.claim_text: Reduced payment processing latency by 30 percent.
Improved payments reliability with idempotent retries.
Maintained the internal design-system component library.
